Glass Diameter: 8 Cm, Height: 10 Cm, Volume: 350 ML
FullDescription:
Steel Copper Traditional Dinner Set Of Thali Plate, Bowls, Glass And Spoon
This is a dinnerware thali plate set consists of 1 plate (Thali), 4 bowls, 1 tumbler, 1 dessert spoon, 1 fork and 1 knife. In India, most of their dishes are served simultaneously in a thali. A thali is a round platter with an eared rim. Entire meals can be served using this simple plate. The thali is generally made with steel or copper. Other dishes served on a thali include vegetables, yogurt, chutney, and pickles. In restaurants, vegetarian or meat-based thalis can be served. Thali is delightful ways to enjoy Indian cuisine. It serves a balanced meal in itself and the flavors are so well rounded that palates will certainly be satisfied. 

 

Care Tips:- Clean your copperware by hand and avoid dishwasher as the detergent can cause oxidation leading to permanent damage. Use a solution of equal quantities vinegar or lemon juice and salt diluted with some water at such times but don't use it regularly. Also avoid scratchy cleaners like steel wool.
